name: Fukubiki
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>福</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ふく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>悲</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>び</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>喜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Each player shuffles their Deck and excavates the top card of their Deck. Add the excavated card with the higher ATK to that player's hand, also send the card with the lower ATK to that player's GY (Spells/Traps, and monsters with ? ATK, are treated as 0). If tied, place those cards on the bottoms of the Decks.
eff: Each player shuffles their Deck and excavates the top card of their Deck. Add the excavated card with the higher ATK to that player's hand, also send the card with the lower ATK to that player's GY (Spells/Traps, and monsters with ? ATK, are treated as 0). If tied, place those cards on the bottoms of the Decks.

action: Adds excavated cards to the hand
Adds from your opponent's Deck to your opponent's hand
Sends excavated cards to the Graveyard
Places excavated cards on the bottom of the Deck
